overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in ancient robes walking along desert sand dunes beside a palm-lined river. The scene features warm golden hour lighting with mountains visible in the distance, consistent with Assassin's Creed Origins.

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the sand dune parallel to the water's edge, maintaining a consistent pace

entered.detail: dense line of palm trees marking the edge of the river oasis
calm water body running parallel to the sand dune
large orange sand dune with visible footprints and ripples
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a desert sand dune during golden hour, with a palm-lined river to the left and vast open desert to the right. The warm sunlight casts long shadows across the rippled sand surface while distant mountains frame the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desert landscape bathed in the warm glow of the golden hour. It begins by tracking a character in ancient robes as they walk steadily across a rippled sand dune, with the sunlight casting long, dramatic shadows over the terrain. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal a lush, palm-lined river flowing to the left, contrasting with the vast, open desert stretching to the right. The scene finally opens up to frame the distant, hazy mountains that anchor the horizon under the shimmering light.
